etymology.description: 夕(夕) (xī, "evening") duplicated -> many evenings -> ancient form of 多(多) (duō, "many")
etymology.interpretation: The character 夛 consists of two 夕(夕) (xī, "evening"), similar to the way duplicative nature gives the meaning of "many." It represents an ancient form, indicating more than one or an abundance, similar to 本(本) (běn, "root") and 林(林) (lín, "forest") for woods.
